speaker: rep
text: Hi Jennifer, thanks for making time today. I understand you wanted to dive deeper into our pricing and see if we can make the numbers work for your team.

speaker: prospect
text: Yes, exactly. We liked the demo but the pricing feels steep for a startup our size. We only have 8 reps.

speaker: rep
text: I appreciate you being upfront about that. Before we get into numbers, can you tell me what your current cost per booked meeting is?

speaker: prospect
text: Honestly, I'm not sure of the exact number. But I know we're spending about $15K a month on tools and the results aren't great.

speaker: rep
text: That's helpful context. So at $15K monthly across 8 reps, you're looking at roughly $1,875 per rep on tools alone. Our platform would consolidate several of those tools.

speaker: prospect
text: Maybe, but your per-seat price of $149 times 8 is still $1,192 per month on top of what we already pay for Salesforce.

speaker: rep
text: That's a fair point. Let me, um, sort of walk through the value here. So basically what happens is that our customers typically see, you know, like a 3x improvement in meetings booked per rep.

speaker: prospect
text: 3x sounds too good to be true. What's the realistic number for a startup like ours?

speaker: rep
text: Fair skepticism. For teams your size, the median improvement is 2.2x in meetings booked within 90 days. I can share case studies from similar stage companies.

speaker: prospect
text: That would help. Also, we got a quote from Apollo that's about 40% cheaper. Why should we pay the premium?

speaker: rep
text: So, like, I think maybe Apollo is, you know, a different kind of tool. They're more of a data provider.

speaker: prospect
text: They have engagement features too now. Cold email, sequences, the whole thing. And their AI writer is decent.

speaker: rep
text: You're right, they've expanded. The key difference is in deliverability and personalization quality. Our email warm-up system and AI personalization consistently outperform in head-to-head tests.

speaker: prospect
text: Do you have data to back that up?

speaker: rep
text: Absolutely. In a recent benchmark with 50 accounts, our personalized sequences achieved a 12% reply rate versus 4% for generic sequences. I'll send you the full report.

speaker: prospect
text: Okay, the data helps. But budget is still tight. Can you do anything on price?

speaker: rep
text: I have some flexibility. For an annual commitment, I can offer 25% off, bringing it to $112 per seat. That's $896 monthly for your team.

speaker: prospect
text: That's better. What about a money-back guarantee if we don't see results?

speaker: rep
text: We don't do money-back, but we do have a performance clause. If you don't see at least a 50% improvement in reply rates after 90 days, we'll extend your contract free for another quarter.

speaker: prospect
text: I like that. Let me run the annual pricing by my co-founder. Can you send a formal proposal?

speaker: rep
text: I'll have the proposal in your inbox within the hour. Should we schedule a call with your co-founder for Thursday?

speaker: prospect
text: Thursday at 2 PM works. Include the case studies and the benchmark report with the proposal.

speaker: rep
text: Done. I'll send the proposal, case studies, and benchmark report today, and a calendar invite for Thursday at 2 PM. Thanks Jennifer.
